assignments.description: Adds the ID of the current coverage benefit record to the CoverageBenefitIds collection.
assignments.name: AddCoverageBenefitIdToCollection
assignments.label: Add Coverage Benefit ID to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the ID of the current coverage benefit item record to the CoverageBenefitItemIds collection.
assignments.name: AddCoverageBenefitItemIdToCollection
assignments.label: Add Coverage Benefit Item ID to Collection

assignments.description: Sets the current coverage benefit record’s Pharma Copay Amount to AppliedLimitToIntegerFormula and adds the record to the UpdatedCoverageBenefitRecords collection.
assignments.name: AddCurrentCoverageBenefitToCollection
assignments.label: Add Current Coverage Benefit to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the Pharma Copay Amount of the coverage benefit record to CopaySum.
assignments.name: AddPharmaCopayAmountToCopaySum
assignments.label: Add Pharma Copay Amount to Copay Sum

assignments.description: Adds the care benefit verify request record associated with a primary member plan to the EffectiveCareBenefitVerifyRequests collection.
assignments.name: AddPrimaryCareBenefitVerifyRequestToCollection
assignments.label: Add Primary Care Benefit Verify Request to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the care benefit verify request record associated with a secondary member plan to the EffectiveCareBenefitVerifyRequests collection.
assignments.name: AddSecondaryCareBenefitVerifyRequestToCollection
assignments.label: Add Secondary Care Benefit Verify Request to Collection

assignments.description: Adds 1 to the stepNumber variable.
assignments.name: AssignStepNumber
assignments.label: Assign Step Number

assignments.description: Sets PrimaryMemberPlanCareBenefitVerifyRequest and SecondaryMemberPlanCareBenefitVerifyRequest to an empty string.
assignments.name: ResetMemberPlanCareBenefitVerifyRequestVariables
assignments.label: Reset Member Plan Care Benefit Verify Request Variables

assignments.description: Sets PotentialBenefitAmount to PotentialBenefitAmountFormula, BenefitAssignmentEndDate to BenefitAssignmentEndDateFormula, and outOfPocketExpense to OutOfPocketExpenseFormula.
assignments.name: SetBenefitVariables
assignments.label: Set Benefit Variables

assignments.description: Sets PrimaryMemberPlanCareBenefitVerifyRequestId to the ID of the current care benefit verify request record.
assignments.name: SetCareBenefitVerifyRequestMemberPlanPrimary
assignments.label: Set Care Benefit Verify Request Member Plan

assignments.description: Sets SecondaryMemberPlanCareBenefitVerifyRequestId to the ID of the current care benefit verify request record.
assignments.name: SetCareBenefitVerifyRequestMemberPlanSecondary
assignments.label: Set Care Benefit Verify Request Member Plan

assignments.description: Sets CopaySum to the AppliedLimitToIntegerFormula.
assignments.name: SetCopaySum
assignments.label: Set Copay Sum

assignments.description: Sets EnrolleeLimitFrequencyMultiplier to 1 and BenefitEndDate to BenefitEndDateFormula.
assignments.name: SetEnrolleeLimitFrequencyMultiplierMonthly
assignments.label: Set Enrollee Limit Frequency Multiplier

assignments.description: Sets EnrolleeLimitFrequencyMultiplier to 3 and and BenefitEndDate to BenefitEndDateFormula.
assignments.name: SetEnrolleeLimitFrequencyMultiplierQuarterly
assignments.label: Set Enrollee Limit Frequency Multiplier

assignments.description: Sets EnrolleeLimitFrequencyMultiplier to 12 and and BenefitEndDate to BenefitEndDateFormula.
assignments.name: SetEnrolleeLimitFrequencyMultiplierYearly
assignments.label: Set Enrollee Limit Frequency Multiplier

assignments.description: Sets ExceptionMessage to the message that the flow returns when there’s an error getting, creating, or updating a record.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessage
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets ExceptionMessage to MaximumBenefitAmountReachedErrorTextTemplate.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessageMaximumBenefitAmountReached
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets PayoutFrequencyMultiplier to 1 and PayoutFrequencyEndDate to CurrentMonthEndDateFormula.
assignments.name: SetPayoutFrequencyMultiplierMonthly
assignments.label: Set Payout Frequency Multiplier

assignments.description: Sets PayoutFrequencyMultiplier to 3 and PayoutFrequencyEndDate to CurrentQuarterEndDateFormula.
assignments.name: SetPayoutFrequencyMultiplierQuarterly
assignments.label: Set Payout Frequency Multiplier

assignments.description: Sets PayoutFrequencyMultiplier to 12 and PayoutFrequencyEndDate to CurrentYearEndDateFormula.
assignments.name: SetPayoutFrequencyMultiplierYearly
assignments.label: Set Payout Frequency Multiplier

decisions.description: Determines whether the Product ID of the current record in IterateOverCareBenefitVerifyRequests matches the current Product ID in IterateOverProductsIds.
decisions.name: DoesTheDrugMatch
decisions.label: Does the Drug Match?

decisions.description: Determines whether the maximum benefit amount has been reached by checking if the benefit’s Maximum Benefit Amount is greater than Benefit Amount Used and RemainingBenefitAmountFormula greater than PotentialBenefitAmount.
decisions.name: HasMaximumBenefitAmountReached
decisions.label: Has Maximum Benefit Amount Reached?

decisions.description: Determines the member plan of the current care benefit verify request record.
decisions.name: HasWhichMemberPlan
decisions.label: Has Which Member Plan?

decisions.description: Determines whether the current coverage benefit record has an associated coverage benefit item record.
decisions.name: HaveAssociatedCoverageBenefitItemLimit
decisions.label: Have Associated Coverage Benefit Item Limit?

decisions.description: Determines whether coverage benefit items need to be fetched by checking if the CoverageBenefitIds collection isn’t null.
decisions.name: HaveCoverageBenefitIds
decisions.label: Have Coverage Benefit IDs?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Pharma Copay Amount field on the current coverage benefit record has a value.
decisions.name: HavePharmaCopayAmount
decisions.label: Have Pharma Copay Amount?

decisions.description: Determines the applicant frequency by checking if the benefit record’s Enrollee Limit Frequency is Quarterly, Monthly, or Yearly.
decisions.name: WhatIsTheEnrolleeLimitFrequency
decisions.label: What is the Enrollee Limit Frequency?

decisions.description: Determines the payout frequency by checking if the benefit record’s Payout Frequency is Quarterly, Monthly, or Yearly.
decisions.name: WhatIsThePayoutFrequency
decisions.label: What is the Payout Frequency?

decisions.description: Determines whether the plan type of the current care benefit verify request record is Primary or Secondary.
decisions.name: WhatIsThePlanTypeOfCareBenefitVerifyRequest
decisions.label: What is the Plan Type of Care Benefit Verify Request?

formulas.description: Converts the data type of the applied limit from string to integer.
formulas.name: AppliedLimitToIntegerFormula

formulas.description: Calculates the end date of the benefit assignment.
formulas.name: BenefitAssignmentEndDateFormula

formulas.description: Calculates the end date of the benefit.
formulas.name: BenefitEndDateFormula

formulas.description: Calculates the end date of the current month.
formulas.name: CurrentMonthEndDateFormula

formulas.description: Calculates the end date of the current quarter.
formulas.name: CurrentQuarterEndDateFormula
formulas.expression: CASE(CEILING( MONTH ( {!CurrentDateFormula} ) / 3 ), 1, DATE(YEAR({!CurrentDateFormula}), 03,31), 2, DATE(YEAR({!CurrentDateFormula}), 06,30), 3, DATE(YEAR({!CurrentDateFormula}), 09,30), 4, DATE(YEAR({!CurrentDateFormula}), 12,31), NULL)

formulas.description: Calculates the end date of the current year.
formulas.name: CurrentYearEndDateFormula

formulas.description: Calculates the maximum amount that can be availed as benefit.
formulas.name: MaximumBenenfitAmountFormula

formulas.description: Calculates the out-of-pocket expense for the benefit request.
formulas.name: OutOfPocketExpenseFormula

Flow.interviewLabel: Calculate and Assign Benefits V2 - Patient Services {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Calculate and Assign Benefits V2 - Patient Services

loops.description: Repeats actions for each care benefit verify request record in careBenefitVerifyRequests.
loops.name: IterateOverCareBenefitVerifyRequests
loops.label: Iterate Over Care Benefit Verify Requests

loops.description: Repeats actions for each coverage benefit item limit record in Coverage Benefit Item Limits from GetCoverageBenefitItemLimits.
loops.name: IterateOverCoverageBenefitItemLimits
loops.label: Iterate Over Coverage Benefit Item Limits

loops.description: Repeats actions for each coverage benefit item record in Benefit Items from GetCoverageBenefitItems.
loops.name: IterateOverCoverageBenefitItems
loops.label: Iterate Over Coverage Benefit Items

loops.description: Repeats actions for each coverage benefit record in Coverage Benefits from GetCoverageBenefits.
loops.name: IterateOverCoverageBenefits
loops.label: Iterate Over Coverage Benefits

loops.description: Repeats actions for each coverage benefit record in Coverage Benefits from GetCoverageBenefits.
loops.name: IterateOverCoverageBenefitsUpdate
loops.label: Iterate Over Coverage Benefits

loops.description: Repeats actions for each product ID in the productIds collection.
loops.name: IterateOverProductsIds
loops.label: Iterate Over Product IDs

recordCreates.description: Creates the benefit assignment record using the values passed into the flow. Stores the ID of the new benefit assignment record in the benefitAssignmenttId variable.
recordCreates.name: CreateBenefitAssignment
recordCreates.label: Create Benefit Assignment

recordCreates.description: Creates a process exception record using the information passed into the flow. Stores the ID of the new process exception record in Process ExceptionId from CreateProcessException.
recordCreates.name: CreateProcessException
recordCreates.label: Create Process Exception

recordCreates.description: Creates the program enrollment record using the values passed into the flow. Stores the ID of the new program enrollment record in Program EnrollmentId from CreateProgramEnrollment.
recordCreates.name: CreateProgramEnrollment
recordCreates.label: Create Program Enrollment

recordLookups.description: Gets the benefit record with a Program ID matching the programId passed into the flow and Active is True. Stores the result in the benefit record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetBenefit
recordLookups.label: Get Benefit

recordLookups.description: Gets the care limit type record with a Limit Type equal to Copay, and Metric Type equal to Money or Amount. Stores the result in the Care Limit Type from GetCareLimitType record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetCareLimitType
recordLookups.label: Get Care Limit Type

recordLookups.description: Gets the coverage benefit item limit records with a Coverage Benefit Item ID that’s in CoverageBenefitItemIds, and Care Limit Type ID matching the ID of the record in Care Limit Type from GetCareLimitType. Stores the results in the Coverage Benefit Item Limits from GetCoverageBenefitItemLimits record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetCoverageBenefitItemLimits
recordLookups.label: Get Coverage Benefit Item Limits

recordLookups.description: Gets the coverage benefit item records with a Coverage Benefit ID that’s in CoverageBenefitIds, and Active is True. Stores the results in the Coverage Benefit Items from GetCoverageBenefitItems record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetCoverageBenefitItems
recordLookups.label: Get Coverage Benefit Items

recordLookups.description: Gets the coverage benefit records with a Care Benefit Verify Request ID that’s in EffectiveCareBenefitVerifyRequests, and Active is True. Stores the results in the Coverage Benefits from GetCoverageBenefits record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetCoverageBenefits
recordLookups.label: Get Coverage Benefits

recordUpdates.description: Updates the application form record with an ID that matches the applicationFormId passed into the flow, setting the Stage to Approved.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateApplicationFormApproved
recordUpdates.label: Update Application Form

recordUpdates.description: Updates the application form record with an ID that matches applicationFormId, setting the stage to Rejected.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateApplicationFormRejected
recordUpdates.label: Update Application Form

recordUpdates.description: Updates the coverage benefit records associated with the IDs in UpdatedCoverageBenefitRecords, setting the Pharma Copay Amount to CopaySum.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateCoverageBenefits
recordUpdates.label: Update Coverage Benefits

textTemplates.description: Stores the text template that contains the message that the flow returns when the maximum benefit amount has been reached.
textTemplates.name: MaximumBenefitAmountReachedErrorTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: You've reached the maximum benefit amount.

variables.description: Stores the application form ID that was passed into the flow.
variables.name: applicationFormId

variables.description: Stores the benefit record associated with the programId passed into the flow. This value is available as output from the flow.
variables.name: benefit

variables.description: Stores the end date of the benefit assignment.
variables.name: BenefitAssignmentEndDate

variables.description: Stores the ID of the benefit assignment record created by the flow. This value is available as output from the flow.
variables.name: benefitAssignmenttId

variables.description: Stores the end date of the benefit.
variables.name: BenefitEndDate

variables.description: Stores the care benefit verify request records passed into the flow.
variables.name: careBenefitVerifyRequests

variables.description: The ID of the financial assistance program enrollee.
variables.name: careProgramEnrolleeId

variables.description: The running total of the copay amount for a drug.
variables.name: CopaySum

variables.description: Stores the IDs of the coverage benefit records to process.
variables.name: CoverageBenefitIds

variables.description: Stores the IDs of the coverage benefit item records to process.
variables.name: CoverageBenefitItemIds

variables.description: Stores a collection of care benefit verify request records to be processed.
variables.name: EffectiveCareBenefitVerifyRequests

variables.description: Stores the multiplier for enrollee limit frequency of a potential benefit calculation.
variables.name: EnrolleeLimitFrequencyMultiplier

variables.description: Stores the message that’s assigned to the Message field of the process exception record to be created.
variables.name: ExceptionMessage

variables.description: Stores the flow orchestration instance related object ID that was passed into the flow.
variables.name: flowOrchInstRelaObjId

variables.description: Stores the out-of-pocket expense for the benefit request.
variables.name: outOfPocketExpense

variables.description: Stores the end date for the payout frequency.
variables.name: PayoutFrequencyEndDate

variables.description: Stores the multiplier for payout frequency of a potential benefit calculation.
variables.name: PayoutFrequencyMultiplier

variables.description: Stores the amount that the patient can get as part of the Financial Assistance program.
variables.name: PotentialBenefitAmount

variables.description: Stores the ID of care benefit verify request record associated with a primary member plan.
variables.name: PrimaryMemberPlanCareBenefitVerifyRequestId

variables.description: Stores the collection of product IDs passed into the flow.
variables.name: productIds

variables.description: Stores the Program ID of the Financial Assistance Program passed into the flow.
variables.name: programId

variables.description: Stores the ID of care benefit verify request record associated with a secondary member plan.
variables.name: SecondaryMemberPlanCareBenefitVerifyRequestId

variables.description: Stores the step number of the current stage.
variables.name: stepNumber

variables.description: Stores the coverage benefit records with the updated pharma copay amount.
variables.name: UpdatedCoverageBenefitRecords
